item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
phrase='"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$plan" --session scenario-06-final-five-checks --meta >/dev/null
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-final-five-checks --meta >/dev/null
printf '"'STRATEGY\\n'
jq -e '(.strategy|type)==\"string\" and .strategy==\"canary\"' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F '"'"'`canary` strategy'"' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
if rg -n -uu '"'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$root"; then exit 1; fi
printf '"'strategy=PASS current:canary abandoned:0\\n'
printf 'NUMERIC_VALUES\\n'
jq -r '([\"schema_version\",(.schema_version|type),(.schema_version|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"batch_size\",(.batch_size|type),(.batch_size|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"rollback_error_rate\",(.rollback_error_rate|type),(.rollback_error_rate|tostring)]|@tsv)' \""'$plan"
jq -e '"'(.schema_version|type)==\"number\" and (.schema_version % 1)==0 and .schema_version==1 and (.batch_size|type)==\"number\" and (.batch_size % 1)==0 and .batch_size==25 and (.rollback_error_rate|type)==\"number\" and .rollback_error_rate==0.02' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'numeric_values=PASS\\n'
printf 'PHASE_BOUNDARY\\n'
jq -e --arg phrase \""'$phrase" '"'.safety_conditions == ["'$phrase]'"' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F -x "$phrase" "$docs" >/dev/null
plan_phase_count=$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
docs_phase_count="'$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
test \""'$plan_phase_count" = 1 && test "$docs_phase_count" = 1
printf '"'phase_boundary=PASS plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_phase_count" "$docs_phase_count"
printf '"'DOCS_AGREEMENT\\n'
for pair in \\
  'schema_version|Schema version "'`1`'"' \\
  'strategy|"'`canary` strategy'"' \\
  'batch_size|batch size "'`25`'"' \\
  'rollback_error_rate|rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' \\
  'dry_run_first|"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' \\
  'owner|owner is "'`data-platform`'"'; do
  label="'${pair%%|*}
  token=${pair#*|}
  rg -F -- "$token" "$docs" >/dev/null
  printf '"'%s=PASS\\n' \""'$label"
done
printf '"'docs_agreement=PASS\\n'
printf 'ARTIFACT_INVENTORY\\n'
actual="'$(find "$root" -type f | sed "s#''^$root/##" | sort)
expected=$(printf '"'%s\\n' 'docs/migration.md' 'migration/plan.json' | sort)
test \""'$actual" = "$expected"
printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$actual"
printf '"'artifact_inventory=PASS count:2 unrequested:0\\n'
printf 'FINAL_REQUESTED_CHECKS_EXIT=0\\n'"

item.aggregated_output:
batch_size=PASS
rollback_error_rate=PASS
dry_run_first=PASS
owner=PASS
docs_agreement=PASS
ARTIFACT_INVENTORY
docs/migration.md
migration/plan.json
artifact_inventory=PASS count:2 unrequested:0
FINAL_REQUESTED_CHECKS_EXIT=0
